name: mindlore
description: AI-native knowledge system for Claude Code. Persistent, searchable, evolving knowledge base with FTS5.

skills.name: mindlore-ingest
skills.description: Add new knowledge sources (URL, text, file, PDF, GitHub repo)

skills.name: mindlore-health
skills.description: Run 18-point structural health check on .mindlore/ knowledge base

skills.name: mindlore-query
skills.description: Search, ask, stats, brief — compounding knowledge pipeline

skills.name: mindlore-log
skills.description: Session logging, pattern extraction, wiki updates

skills.name: mindlore-decide
skills.description: Record and list decisions with context, alternatives, rationale
